spells.name: Acid Splash
spells.desc: Hurl a bubble of acid. One or two creatures within 5 ft. of each other take 1d6 acid damage (DEX save negates). Damage increases: 2d6 at 5th, 3d6 at 11th, 4d6 at 17th.

spells.name: Blade Ward
spells.desc: Extend your hand and trace a sigil of warding. Until the end of your next turn, you have resistance against bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage dealt by weapon attacks.

spells.name: Booming Blade
spells.desc: As part of this spell's casting, make a melee attack. On a hit, the target suffers the attack's normal effects and is sheathed in booming energy. If the target willingly moves before the start of your next turn, it takes 1d8 thunder damage. Both dice increase at higher levels.

spells.name: Chill Touch
spells.desc: Create a ghostly skeletal hand in the space of a creature. Make a ranged spell attack. On hit: 1d8 necrotic damage, target can't regain HP until start of your next turn. Undead also have disadvantage on attack rolls.

spells.name: Dancing Lights
spells.desc: Create up to four torch-sized lights that hover in the air within 120 ft. Each sheds dim light in a 10-ft radius. Bonus action to move them up to 60 ft.

spells.name: Druidcraft
spells.desc: Minor nature effects: predict weather, make flower bloom, create minor sensory effect, or light/snuff small fire.

spells.name: Eldritch Blast
spells.desc: Ranged spell attack: 1d10 force damage. Additional beams at 5th (2), 11th (3), 17th (4) level, each targeting the same or different creatures.

spells.name: Fire Bolt
spells.desc: Ranged spell attack: 1d10 fire damage. Flammable objects ignite. Damage: 2d10 at 5th, 3d10 at 11th, 4d10 at 17th.

spells.name: Friends

material.desc: a small amount of makeup applied to the face as this spell is cast

spells.desc: For the duration, you have advantage on all Charisma checks directed at one creature of your choice that isn't hostile toward you. When the spell ends, the creature realizes that you used magic to influence its mood and becomes hostile toward you.

spells.name: Green-Flame Blade

material.desc: a melee weapon worth at least 1 SP

spells.desc: You brandish the weapon used in the spell's casting and make a melee attack with it against one creature within 5 feet of you. On a hit, the target suffers the weapon attack's normal effects, and you can cause green fire to leap from the target to a different creature of your choice that you can see within 5 feet of it. The damage increases at levels 5, 11, and 17.

spells.name: Guidance
spells.desc: Touch a willing creature. Once before the spell ends, the target can add 1d4 to one ability check.

spells.name: Light
spells.desc: Touch an object. It sheds bright light in a 20-ft radius, dim light for an additional 20 ft. If covered, the light is blocked. Dispel with another casting.

spells.name: Mage Hand
spells.desc: Spectral floating hand appears. Can manipulate objects, open unlocked doors, stow/retrieve items. Carry up to 10 lbs.

spells.name: Mending
spells.desc: Repairs a single break or tear in an object you touch (metal, wood, bone, porcelain). The repair is invisible. Can't restore magical item properties.

spells.name: Message
spells.desc: Whisper a message to a creature within range. Target can whisper a reply that only you hear. Bypasses obstacles if you know the route. Not magical silence.

spells.name: Mind Sliver
spells.desc: You drive a disorienting spike of psychic energy into the mind of one creature you can see within range. The target must succeed on an Intelligence saving throw or take 1d6 psychic damage and subtract 1d4 from the next saving throw it makes before the end of your next turn. The damage increases by 1d6 at levels 5, 11, and 17.

spells.name: Minor Illusion
spells.desc: Create a sound or image of a small object. Creatures can investigate (INT vs DC). Discerned if illusory. Sound: up to your voice volume.

spells.name: Poison Spray
spells.desc: Project a puff of noxious gas. One creature in range makes CON save or takes 1d12 poison damage. Damage: 2d12/5th, 3d12/11th, 4d12/17th.

spells.name: Prestidigitation
spells.desc: Minor magical tricks: create sensory effect, light/snuff fire, clean/soil object, warm/cool/flavor food, mark surface, create trinket.

spells.name: Produce Flame
spells.desc: A flickering flame appears in your hand. It sheds bright light in a 10-foot radius and dim light for an additional 10 feet. The flame doesn't burn you. You can hurl it at a target within 30 feet as a ranged spell attack, dealing 1d8 fire damage on a hit. The damage increases by 1d8 at levels 5, 11, and 17.

spells.name: Ray of Frost
spells.desc: Ranged spell attack. On hit: 1d8 cold damage, target's speed reduced 10 ft until start of your next turn.

spells.name: Resistance

material.desc: a miniature cloak

spells.desc: You touch one willing creature. Once before the spell ends, the target can roll a d4 and add the number rolled to one saving throw of its choice. It can roll the die before or after making the saving throw.

spells.name: Sacred Flame
spells.desc: Flame-like radiance descends. Target makes DEX save or takes 1d8 radiant damage. No benefit from cover.

spells.name: Shillelagh
spells.desc: Wood of a club or quarterstaff you hold is imbued. Damage die 1d8, use spellcasting ability instead of STR.

spells.name: Shocking Grasp
spells.desc: Melee spell attack (advantage vs metal armor). On hit: 1d8 lightning damage, target can't take reactions until start of its next turn.

spells.name: Spare the Dying
spells.desc: Touch a living creature at 0 HP. It becomes stable. No effect on undead or constructs.

spells.name: Sword Burst
spells.desc: You create a momentary circle of spectral blades that sweep around you. All other creatures within 5 feet of you must each succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or take 1d6 force damage. The damage increases by 1d6 at levels 5, 11, and 17.

spells.name: Thaumaturgy
spells.desc: Manifest minor wonder: voice booms, flames flicker/change color, harmless tremor, eyes glow, doors bang open/shut, alter appearance briefly.

spells.name: Thunderclap
spells.desc: You create a burst of thunderous sound that can be heard up to 100 feet away. Each creature other than you within 5 feet of you must make a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, a creature takes 1d6 thunder damage. The damage increases by 1d6 at levels 5, 11, and 17.

spells.name: Toll the Dead
spells.desc: Point at a creature. WIS save or 1d8 necrotic (1d12 if missing HP). Scaling: 2d8/2d12 at 5th.

spells.name: True Strike
spells.desc: Extend your hand and point at a target. Your magic grants you a brief insight. On your next turn, you have advantage on your first attack roll against the target.

spells.name: Vicious Mockery
spells.desc: Unleash string of insults. WIS save or take 1d4 psychic damage and have disadvantage on the next attack roll it makes before the end of its next turn.

spells.name: Word of Radiance

material.desc: a holy symbol

spells.desc: You utter a divine word, and burning radiance erupts from you. Each creature of your choice that you can see within range must succeed on a Constitution saving throw or take 1d6 radiant damage. The damage increases by 1d6 at levels 5, 11, and 17.

spells.name: Alarm
spells.desc: Set an alarm against unwanted intrusion. Ward a door, window, or area no larger than a 20-ft cube. Mental ping or audible alarm when triggered.

spells.name: Animal Friendship

material.desc: a morsel of food

spells.desc: This spell lets you convince a beast that you mean it no harm. Choose a beast that you can see within range. It must have an Intelligence of 3 or less. The target must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or be charmed by you for the spell's duration. If you or one of your companions harms the target, the spell ends.

spells.name: Bane
spells.desc: Up to 3 creatures make CHA saves or subtract 1d4 from attack rolls and saving throws while spell lasts.

spells.name: Bless
spells.desc: Up to 3 creatures add 1d4 to attack rolls and saving throws while spell lasts.

spells.name: Burning Hands
spells.desc: 15-ft cone of fire. Each creature: DEX save or 3d6 fire damage (half on save). Flammable objects ignite. +1d6 per higher slot.

spells.name: Charm Person
spells.desc: Charm a humanoid. WIS save (advantage if in combat). Charmed creature regards you as friendly. It knows it was charmed when spell ends.

spells.name: Chromatic Orb

material.desc: a diamond worth 50 GP

spells.desc: You hurl a 4-inch-diameter sphere of energy at a creature that you can see within range. You choose acid, cold, fire, lightning, poison, or thunder for the type of orb you create, and then make a ranged spell attack against the target. If the attack hits, the creature takes 3d8 damage of the type you chose. At higher levels, the damage increases by 1d8 per slot level above 1st.

spells.name: Color Spray

material.desc: a pinch of powder or sand in red, yellow, and blue

spells.desc: A dazzling array of flashing, colored light springs from your hand. Roll 6d10; the total is how many hit points of creatures this spell can affect. Creatures in a 15-foot cone that have the fewest hit points are affected first: they are blinded until the end of your next turn.

spells.name: Command
spells.desc: Speak a one-word command. WIS save or creature obeys. Common words: Approach, Drop, Flee, Grovel, Halt.

spells.name: Comprehend Languages
spells.desc: Understand any spoken language. Understand written language you touch (1 page/min). Deciphers coded messages but not ciphered text.

spells.name: Create or Destroy Water

material.desc: a drop of water if creating water or a few grains of sand if destroying it

spells.desc: You either create or destroy water. Create Water: You create up to 10 gallons of clean water within range in an open container. Alternatively, the water falls as rain in a 30-foot cube within range, extinguishing exposed flames in the area. Destroy Water: You destroy up to 10 gallons of water in an open container within range.

spells.name: Cure Wounds
spells.desc: Restore 1d8 + spellcasting ability modifier HP to a creature you touch. No effect on undead or constructs. +1d8 per higher slot.

spells.name: Detect Evil and Good
spells.desc: For the duration, you know if there is an aberration, celestial, elemental, fey, fiend, or undead within 30 feet of you, as well as where the creature is located. Similarly, you know if there is a place or object within 30 feet that has been magically consecrated or desecrated.

spells.name: Detect Magic
spells.desc: Sense presence of magic within 30 ft. You can use action to see a faint aura around magical creatures or objects, and learn their school of magic.

spells.name: Detect Poison and Disease

material.desc: a yew leaf

spells.desc: For the duration, you can sense the presence and location of poisons, poisonous creatures, and diseases within 30 feet of you. You also identify the kind of poison, poisonous creature, or disease in each case.

spells.name: Divine Favor
spells.desc: Your weapon attacks deal an extra 1d4 radiant damage.

spells.name: Ensnaring Strike
spells.desc: The next time you hit a creature with a weapon attack before this spell ends, a writhing mass of thorny vegetation appears and grasps the target. The target must succeed on a Strength saving throw or be restrained by the magical plants. A restrained target takes 1d6 piercing damage at the start of each of its turns.

spells.name: Entangle
spells.desc: Grasping weeds and vines sprout from the ground in a 20-foot square starting from a point within range. For the duration, these plants turn the area into difficult terrain. A creature in the area when you cast the spell must succeed on a Strength saving throw or be restrained by the entangling plants.

spells.name: Expeditious Retreat
spells.desc: Dash as a bonus action for the duration.

spells.name: Faerie Fire
spells.desc: Outline creatures and objects in a 20-ft cube in blue, green, or violet. DEX save or affected; attack rolls have advantage against them, they can't benefit from invisibility.

spells.name: False Life

material.desc: a small amount of alcohol or distilled spirits

spells.desc: Bolstering yourself with a necromantic facsimile of life, you gain 1d4+4 temporary hit points for the duration. At higher levels, you gain 5 additional temporary hit points for each spell slot level above 1st.

spells.name: Feather Fall
spells.desc: React when you or a creature within range falls. Up to 5 falling creatures descend at 60 ft/round, take no falling damage.

spells.name: Find Familiar
spells.desc: Gain service of a familiar (bat, cat, crab, frog, hawk, lizard, octopus, owl, poisonous snake, fish, rat, raven, sea horse, spider, weasel). Can share senses and deliver touch spells.

spells.name: Fog Cloud
spells.desc: Create a 20-ft-radius sphere of fog. Heavily obscured. Radius +20 ft per higher slot.

spells.name: Goodberry
spells.desc: Up to 10 berries appear, each restoring 1 HP when eaten. Nourishes for a full day. Last 24 hours.

spells.name: Grease
spells.desc: Slick grease covers a 10-ft square. Creatures entering or starting there: DEX save or fall prone. Area is difficult terrain.

spells.name: Guiding Bolt
spells.desc: Ranged spell attack: 4d6 radiant damage, next attack against target before end of your next turn has advantage. +1d6 per higher slot.

spells.name: Healing Word
spells.desc: Creature regains 1d4 + spellcasting ability mod HP. +1d4 per higher slot.

spells.name: Hellish Rebuke
spells.desc: React when you take damage: the attacker is surrounded by hellfire. DEX save or take 2d10 fire damage (half on save). +1d10 per higher slot.

spells.name: Heroism
spells.desc: Willing creature becomes immune to frightened. Gains temp HP equal to your spellcasting mod at start of each turn.

spells.name: Hunter's Mark
spells.desc: Mark a creature. Deal extra 1d6 damage on weapon attacks against it. Advantage on Perception/Survival to find it. Move mark as bonus action.

spells.name: Identify
spells.desc: Learn properties of a magic item, spell affecting a creature, or detect if item is magical.

spells.name: Illusory Script

material.desc: a lead-based ink worth 10 GP, which the spell consumes

spells.desc: You write on parchment, paper, or some other suitable writing material and imbue it with a potent illusion. To you and any creatures you designate when you cast the spell, the writing appears normal, written in your hand, and conveys whatever meaning you intended. To all others, the writing appears as if it were written in an unknown or magical script.

spells.name: Inflict Wounds
spells.desc: Melee spell attack: 3d10 necrotic damage. +1d10 per higher slot.

spells.name: Jump
spells.desc: Triple a creature's jump distance.

spells.name: Longstrider
spells.desc: Increase a creature's speed by 10 ft.

spells.name: Mage Armor
spells.desc: Touch a willing creature not wearing armor. Its AC = 13 + DEX modifier.

spells.name: Magic Missile
spells.desc: Three darts of magical force, each deals 1d4+1 force damage (auto-hit). +1 dart per higher slot.

spells.name: Protection from Evil and Good
spells.desc: Protect against aberrations, celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead. They have disadvantage on attack rolls; target can't be charmed/frightened/possessed by them.

spells.name: Ray of Sickness
spells.desc: Ranged spell attack: 2d8 poison damage. On hit, target makes CON save or is poisoned until end of your next turn. +1d8 per higher slot.

spells.name: Shield
spells.desc: React when hit by an attack or targeted by Magic Missile. +5 AC until start of next turn (including vs triggering attack), immune to Magic Missile.

spells.name: Shield of Faith
spells.desc: +2 AC to a creature.

spells.name: Silent Image
spells.desc: Create a visual illusion no larger than 15-ft cube. Appears completely real. Investigation (INT vs DC) to disbelieve. No sound or smell.

spells.name: Sleep
spells.desc: Roll 5d8; creatures in 20-ft sphere up to that many HP fall unconscious (lowest HP first). Undead/immune to charm unaffected. +2d8 per higher slot.

spells.name: Speak with Animals
spells.desc: You gain the ability to comprehend and verbally communicate with beasts for the duration. The knowledge and awareness of many beasts is limited by their intelligence, but at minimum, a beast can give you information about nearby locations and monsters, including whatever it can perceive or has perceived within the past day.

spells.name: Tasha's Hideous Laughter

material.desc: tiny tarts and a feather that is waved in the air

spells.desc: A creature of your choice that you can see within range perceives everything as hilariously funny and falls into fits of laughter if this spell affects it. The target must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or fall prone, becoming incapacitated and unable to stand up for the duration. A creature with an Intelligence score of 4 or less isn't affected.

spells.name: Thunderous Smite
spells.desc: The first time you hit with a melee weapon attack during this spell's duration, your weapon rings with thunder. The attack deals an extra 2d6 thunder damage to the target, which must succeed on a Strength saving throw or be pushed 10 feet away from you and knocked prone.

spells.name: Thunderwave
spells.desc: CON save or 2d8 thunder damage + pushed 10 ft (half, no push on save). Audible 300 ft. +1d8 per higher slot.

spells.name: Unseen Servant

material.desc: a bit of string and of wood

spells.desc: This spell creates an invisible, mindless, shapeless, Medium force that performs simple tasks at your command until the spell ends. The servant springs into existence in an unoccupied space on the ground within range. It has AC 10, 1 hit point, and a Strength of 2.

spells.name: Witch Bolt
spells.desc: Ranged spell attack: 1d12 lightning damage. Each subsequent turn, use action to deal 1d12 more automatically. +1d12 per higher slot.

spells.name: Wrathful Smite
spells.desc: Next melee weapon hit: +1d6 psychic damage, target must WIS save or be frightened until spell ends.

spells.name: Aid
spells.desc: Up to 3 creatures gain +5 HP (max and current). +5 per higher slot.

spells.name: Augury

material.desc: specially marked sticks, bones, or similar tokens worth 25 GP

spells.desc: By casting gem-inlaid sticks, rolling dragon bones, laying out ornate cards, or employing some other divining tool, you receive an omen from an otherworldly entity about the results of a specific course of action that you plan to take within the next 30 minutes. The DM chooses from the following possible omens: Weal, Woe, Weal and woe, or Nothing.

spells.name: Barkskin

material.desc: a handful of oak bark

spells.desc: You touch a willing creature. Until the spell ends, the target's skin has a rough, bark-like appearance, and the target's AC can't be less than 16, regardless of what kind of armor it is wearing.

spells.name: Blindness/Deafness
spells.desc: CON save or target is blinded or deafened (your choice). Repeats at end of each turn.

spells.name: Blur
spells.desc: Your body becomes blurred. Attack rolls against you have disadvantage (unless attacker doesn't rely on sight).

spells.name: Calm Emotions
spells.desc: In 20-ft radius sphere: suppress charm/fright effects on humanoids (CHA save) or make indifferent to creatures they're hostile toward.

spells.name: Cloud of Daggers
spells.desc: Fill 5-ft cube with whirling daggers. Creatures entering or starting there take 4d4 slashing damage. +2d4 per higher slot.

spells.name: Continual Flame

material.desc: ruby dust worth 50 GP, which the spell consumes

spells.desc: A flame, equivalent in brightness to a torch, springs forth from an object that you touch. The effect looks like a regular flame, but it creates no heat and doesn't use oxygen. A continual flame can be covered or hidden but not smothered or quenched.

spells.name: Cordon of Arrows

material.desc: four or more arrows or bolts

spells.desc: You plant four pieces of nonmagical ammunition—arrows or crossbow bolts—in the ground within range and lay magic upon them to protect an area. Until the spell ends, whenever a creature other than you comes within 30 feet of the ammunition for the first time on a turn, it must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or take 1d6 piercing damage.

spells.name: Crown of Madness
spells.desc: WIS save or charmed. Use action each turn to control them to attack the nearest creature (not you). Saves again each turn.

spells.name: Darkness
spells.desc: Magical darkness spreads from a point, 15-ft radius sphere. Blocks darkvision. Counterspell dispels.

spells.name: Darkvision
spells.desc: Grant a creature darkvision to 60 ft.

spells.name: Detect Thoughts

material.desc: a copper piece

spells.desc: For the duration, you can read the thoughts of certain creatures. When you cast the spell and as your action on each turn until the spell ends, you can focus your mind on any one creature that you can see within 30 feet of you. If the creature you choose has an Intelligence of 3 or lower or doesn't speak any language, the creature is unaffected.

spells.name: Dragon's Breath

material.desc: a hot pepper

spells.desc: You touch one willing creature and imbue it with the power to spew magical energy from its mouth, provided it has one. Choose acid, cold, fire, lightning, or poison. Until the spell ends, the creature can use an action to exhale energy of the chosen type in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking 3d6 damage on a failed save.

spells.name: Enhance Ability
spells.desc: Choose one: Bull's Strength (advantage STR, double carry), Cat's Grace (advantage DEX, no fall damage ≤20 ft), Bear's Endurance (advantage CON, +2d6 temp HP), Fox's Cunning (advantage INT), Owl's Wisdom (advantage WIS), Eagle's Splendor (advantage CHA).

spells.name: Find Traps
spells.desc: Sense presence of any trap within range. Not exact location. Traps: anything intended to harm.

spells.name: Flame Blade
spells.desc: Evoke a flaming blade. Melee spell attack: 3d6 fire damage, sheds bright light 10 ft, dim 10 ft. +1d6 per two higher slots.

spells.name: Flaming Sphere
spells.desc: 5-ft-diameter sphere of fire. DEX save or 2d6 fire. Move it 30 ft as bonus action. Creatures adjacent at turn end: 2d6 fire. +1d6 per higher slot.

spells.name: Gentle Repose

material.desc: a pinch of salt and one copper piece placed on each of the corpse's eyes, which must remain there for the duration

spells.desc: You touch a corpse or other remains. For the duration, the target is protected from decay and can't become undead. The spell also effectively extends the time limit on raising the target from the dead, since days spent under the influence of this spell don't count against the time limit of spells such as raise dead.

spells.name: Gust of Wind

material.desc: a legume seed

spells.desc: A line of strong wind 60 feet long and 10 feet wide blasts from you in a direction you choose for the spell's duration. Each creature that starts its turn in the line must succeed on a Strength saving throw or be pushed 15 feet away from you in a direction following the line.

spells.name: Heat Metal
spells.desc: Choose metal object; it glows red-hot. 2d8 fire to any creature in contact. Holding: CON save or drop (or disadvantage on attack rolls). Bonus action to repeat.

spells.name: Hold Person
spells.desc: Paralyze one humanoid. WIS save. Repeats each turn. Attacks within 5 ft against paralyzed target auto-crit. +1 creature per higher slot.

spells.name: Invisibility
spells.desc: Creature becomes invisible until it attacks or casts a spell. +1 creature per higher slot.

spells.name: Knock
spells.desc: Unlock one lock, stuck door, or bound object. Makes loud knock audible 300 ft.

spells.name: Lesser Restoration
spells.desc: End one disease, or one condition: blinded, deafened, paralyzed, or poisoned.

spells.name: Levitate
spells.desc: CON save (if unwilling). Levitate up to 20 ft. Move vertically up to 20 ft per turn. Falls gently when spell ends.

spells.name: Locate Animals or Plants

material.desc: a bit of fur from a bloodhound

spells.desc: Describe or name a specific kind of beast or plant. Concentrating on the voice of nature in your surroundings, you learn the direction and distance to the closest creature or plant of that kind within 5 miles, if any are present.

spells.name: Locate Object

material.desc: a forked twig

spells.desc: Describe or name an object that is familiar to you. You sense the direction to the object's location, as long as that object is within 1,000 feet of you. If the object is in motion, you know the direction of its movement. The spell can locate a specific object known to you, as long as you have seen it up close—within 30 feet—at least once.

spells.name: Magic Weapon
spells.desc: A nonmagical weapon becomes +1 magical. 4th slot: +2. 6th slot: +3.

spells.name: Mirror Image
spells.desc: 3 illusory duplicates. When attacked, d20 determines if duplicate is hit (2: 1 dup, 3: 2 dup, 4+: 3 dup). Destroyed duplicate vanishes.

spells.name: Misty Step
spells.desc: Teleport up to 30 ft to an unoccupied space you can see.

spells.name: Moonbeam

material.desc: several seeds of any moonseed plant and a piece of opalescent feldspar

spells.desc: A silvery beam of pale light shines down in a 5-foot-radius, 40-foot-high cylinder centered on a point within range. Until the spell ends, dim light fills the cylinder. When a creature enters the spell's area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, it is engulfed in ghostly flames that cause searing pain, and it must make a Constitution saving throw, taking 2d10 radiant damage on a failed save.

spells.name: Pass without Trace
spells.desc: You and up to 10 willing creatures within 30 ft gain +10 to Stealth and leave no tracks.

spells.name: Phantasmal Force

material.desc: a bit of fleece

spells.desc: You craft an illusion that takes root in the mind of a creature that you can see within range. The target must make an Intelligence saving throw. On a failed save, you create a phantasmal object, creature, or other phenomenon of your choice. The target perceives it as real and must use its action to interact with the phantasm.

spells.name: Prayer of Healing
spells.desc: Up to 6 creatures regain 2d8 + spellcasting mod HP. +1d8 per higher slot.

spells.name: Rope Trick

material.desc: powdered corn extract and a twisted loop of parchment

spells.desc: You touch a length of rope that is up to 60 feet long. One end of the rope then rises into the air until the whole rope hangs perpendicular to the ground. At the upper end of the rope, an invisible entrance opens to an extradimensional space that lasts until the spell ends. The space can hold up to eight Medium or smaller creatures.

spells.name: See Invisibility

material.desc: a pinch of talc and a small sprinkling of powdered silver

spells.desc: For the duration, you see invisible creatures and objects as if they were visible, and you can see into the Ethereal Plane. Ethereal creatures and objects appear ghostly and translucent.

spells.name: Shadow Blade
spells.desc: You weave together threads of shadow to create a sword of solidified gloom in your hand. This magic sword lasts until the spell ends. It counts as a simple melee weapon and deals 2d8 psychic damage on a hit. It has the finesse, light, and thrown properties. If you drop or throw the sword, it dissipates at the end of the turn.

spells.name: Shatter
spells.desc: Loud ringing noise. 10-ft-radius sphere: CON save or 3d8 thunder (half on save). Disadvantage if made of inorganic material. +1d8 per higher slot.

spells.name: Silence
spells.desc: 20-ft-radius sphere of silence. No sound passes in or out. Verbal spells impossible within.

spells.name: Spider Climb
spells.desc: A willing creature gains the ability to move up, down, and across vertical surfaces and ceilings while leaving hands free.

spells.name: Spike Growth

material.desc: seven sharp thorns or seven small twigs, each sharpened to a point

spells.desc: The ground in a 20-foot radius centered on a point within range twists and sprouts hard spikes and thorns. The area becomes difficult terrain for the duration. When a creature moves into or within the area, it takes 2d4 piercing damage for every 5 feet it travels.

spells.name: Spiritual Weapon
spells.desc: Floating spectral weapon. Bonus action: move 20 ft and make melee spell attack. On hit: 1d8 + spellcasting mod force. +1d8 per two higher slots.

spells.name: Suggestion
spells.desc: Magically influence a humanoid. WIS save or pursue a course of action (not directly harmful).

spells.name: Warding Bond
spells.desc: Bond with a willing creature: both gain +1 AC and saves, resistance to all damage. Damage dealt to bonded creature is also dealt to you.

spells.name: Warding Wind
spells.desc: A strong wind (20 miles per hour) blows around you in a 10-foot radius and moves with you, remaining centered on you. The wind lasts for the spell's duration. The wind has the following effects: deafens you and other creatures in the area, extinguishes unprotected flames, disperses fog/mist/gas/vapors, grants you advantage on ranged weapon attack rolls, ranged weapon attacks against you have disadvantage.

spells.name: Web
spells.desc: 20-ft cube of sticky webbing (must have two anchor points or surface). Restrains creatures (DEX save). Str check to break free. Flammable.

spells.name: Animate Dead

material.desc: a drop of blood, a piece of flesh, and a pinch of bone dust

spells.desc: This spell creates an undead servant. Choose a pile of bones or a corpse of a Medium or Small humanoid within range. Your spell imbues the target with a foul mimicry of life, raising it as an undead creature. The target becomes a skeleton if you chose bones or a zombie if you chose a corpse. On each of your turns, you can use a bonus action to mentally command any creature you made with this spell.

spells.name: Aura of Vitality
spells.desc: Healing energy radiates from you in an aura with a 30-foot radius. Until the spell ends, the aura moves with you, centered on you. You can use a bonus action to cause one creature in the aura (including you) to regain 2d6 hit points.

spells.name: Beacon of Hope
spells.desc: This spell bestows hope and vitality. Choose any number of creatures within range. For the duration, each target has advantage on Wisdom saving throws and death saving throws, and regains the maximum number of hit points possible from any healing.

spells.name: Bestow Curse
spells.desc: WIS save or curse. Choose: disadvantage on chosen ability checks and saves; disadvantage on attack rolls vs you; WIS save each turn or waste action; extra 1d8 necrotic on hits. 4th slot: 10 min (conc). 5th: 8 hr. 7th: 24 hr. 9th: permanent.

spells.name: Call Lightning
spells.desc: Storm cloud 100 ft overhead (if outdoors works too). Each turn: action to call bolt in 60-ft range. DEX save or 3d10 lightning (half on save). Outdoors: 4d10. +1d10 per higher slot.

spells.name: Clairvoyance

material.desc: a focus worth 100 GP, either a jeweled horn for hearing or a glass eye for seeing

spells.desc: You create an invisible sensor within range in a location familiar to you (a place you have visited or seen before) or in an obvious location that is unfamiliar to you. The sensor remains in place for the duration, and it can't be attacked or otherwise interacted with. When you cast the spell, you choose seeing or hearing. You can use the chosen sense through the sensor.

spells.name: Counterspell
spells.desc: Interrupt spellcasting. Spells level 3 or lower: automatic success. Higher: ability check DC 10 + spell level.

spells.name: Create Food and Water
spells.desc: You create 45 pounds of food and 30 gallons of water on the ground or in containers within range, enough to sustain up to fifteen humanoids or five steeds for 24 hours. The food is bland but nourishing, and spoils if uneaten after 24 hours. The water is clean and doesn't go bad.

spells.name: Daylight
spells.desc: A 60-foot-radius sphere of light spreads out from a point you choose within range. The sphere is bright light and sheds dim light for an additional 60 feet. If you chose a point on an object you are holding or one that isn't being worn or carried, the light shines from the object and moves with it. Darkness created by spells of 3rd level or lower is dispelled.

spells.name: Dispel Magic
spells.desc: End one spell of 3rd level or lower. Higher: ability check DC 10 + spell level. Higher slot: automatic for spells of that slot level or lower.

spells.name: Fear
spells.desc: WIS save or frightened; must use movement to move away from you. Can't willingly come closer. Saves again on round end if can't see you.

spells.name: Fireball
spells.desc: 20-ft-radius sphere of fire. DEX save or 8d6 fire (half on save). +1d6 per higher slot.

spells.name: Fly
spells.desc: Flying speed 60 ft. Falls gently when spell ends. +1 creature per higher slot.

spells.name: Gaseous Form

material.desc: a bit of gauze and a wisp of smoke

spells.desc: You transform a willing creature you touch, along with everything it's wearing and carrying, into a misty cloud for the duration. The spell ends if the creature drops to 0 hit points. An incorporeal creature isn't affected. While in this form, the target's only method of movement is a flying speed of 10 feet. The target can enter and occupy the space of another creature.

spells.name: Glyph of Warding

material.desc: incense and powdered diamond worth 200 GP, which the spell consumes

spells.desc: When you cast this spell, you inscribe a glyph that harms other creatures, either upon a surface (such as a table or section of floor) or within an object that can be closed (such as a book, a scroll, or a treasure chest) to conceal the glyph. When the glyph is triggered, it erupts with magical energy in a 20-foot-radius sphere.

spells.name: Haste
spells.desc: One willing creature: speed doubled, +2 AC, advantage on DEX saves, extra action (one weapon attack, Dash, Disengage, Hide, Use Object). On end: can't move/act one turn.

spells.name: Hunger of Hadar

material.desc: a pickled octopus tentacle

spells.desc: You open a gateway to the dark between the stars, a region infested with unknown horrors. A 20-foot-radius sphere of blackness and bitter cold appears centered on a point within range and lasts for the duration. This void is filled with a cacophony of soft whispers and slurping noises that can be heard up to 30 feet away.

spells.name: Hypnotic Pattern

material.desc: a glowing stick of incense or a crystal vial filled with phosphorescent material

spells.desc: You create a twisting pattern of colors that weaves through the air inside a 30-foot cube within range. The pattern appears for a moment and vanishes. Each creature in the area who sees the pattern must make a Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save, the creature becomes charmed for the duration. While charmed by this spell, the creature is incapacitated.

spells.name: Leomund's Tiny Hut

material.desc: a small crystal bead

spells.desc: A 10-foot-radius immobile dome of force springs into existence around and above you and remains stationary for the duration. The spell ends if you leave its area. Nine creatures of Medium size or smaller can fit inside the dome with you. The atmosphere inside the space is comfortable and dry, regardless of the weather outside.

spells.name: Lightning Bolt
spells.desc: 100-ft-long, 5-ft-wide line of lightning. DEX save or 8d6 lightning (half on save). +1d6 per higher slot.

spells.name: Magic Circle

material.desc: holy water or powdered silver and iron worth 100 GP, which the spell consumes

spells.desc: You create a 10-foot-radius, 20-foot-tall cylinder of magical energy centered on a point on the ground that you can see within range. Glowing runes appear wherever the cylinder intersects with the floor or another surface. Choose one or more of the following types of creatures: celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, or undead. The circle affects these creature types.

spells.name: Major Image

material.desc: a bit of fleece

spells.desc: You create the image of an object, a creature, or some other visible phenomenon that is no larger than a 20-foot cube. The image appears at a spot you can see within range and lasts for the duration. The image seems completely real, including sounds, smells, and temperature appropriate to the thing depicted.

spells.name: Mass Healing Word
spells.desc: Up to 6 creatures regain 1d4 + spellcasting mod HP. +1d4 per higher slot.

spells.name: Meld into Stone
spells.desc: You step into a stone object or surface large enough to fully contain your body, melding yourself and all the equipment you carry with the stone for the duration. You can't be perceived by normal senses. Small physical damage to the stone doesn't harm you, but its partial destruction or a change in its shape (to the extent that you no longer fit within it) expels you.

spells.name: Nondetection

material.desc: a pinch of diamond dust worth 25 GP sprinkled over the target, which the spell consumes

spells.desc: For the duration, you hide a target that you touch from divination magic. The target can be a willing creature or a place or an object no larger than 10 feet in any dimension. The target can't be targeted by any divination magic or perceived through magical scrying sensors.

spells.name: Plant Growth
spells.desc: Enrich plants or create overgrowth. Overgrowth: 100-ft-radius sphere, difficult terrain. Enrichment: improves plants in half mile for 1 year.

spells.name: Protection from Energy
spells.desc: One willing creature gains resistance to one damage type (acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder).

spells.name: Remove Curse
spells.desc: At your touch, all curses affecting one creature or object end. If the object is a cursed magic item, its curse remains, but the spell breaks its owner's attunement to the object so it can be removed or discarded.

spells.name: Revivify

material.desc: diamonds worth 300 GP, which the spell consumes

spells.desc: You touch a creature that has died within the last minute. That creature returns to life with 1 hit point. This spell can't return to life a creature that has died of old age, nor can it restore any missing body parts.

spells.name: Sending
spells.desc: Send a 25-word message to any creature you're familiar with. It can send a 25-word response.

spells.name: Sleet Storm

material.desc: a pinch of dust and a few drops of water

spells.desc: Until the spell ends, freezing rain and sleet fall in a 20-foot-tall cylinder with a 40-foot radius centered on a point you choose within range. The area is heavily obscured, and exposed flames in the area are doused. The ground in the area is covered with slick ice, making it difficult terrain.

spells.name: Slow
spells.desc: Up to 6 creatures in 40-ft cube: WIS save or speed halved, -2 AC and DEX saves, can't reactions, lose extra actions, 1 spell or attack per turn (not both).

spells.name: Speak with Dead
spells.desc: Animate a corpse (undead or heavily damaged: won't answer). Ask 5 questions; it answers in the language it knew. Doesn't know things from after death.

spells.name: Speak with Plants
spells.desc: You imbue plants within 30 feet of you with limited sentience and animation, giving them the ability to communicate with you and follow your simple commands. You can question plants about events in the spell's area within the past day, gaining information about creatures that have passed, weather, and other circumstances.

spells.name: Spirit Guardians
spells.desc: Spirits swirl within 15 ft. Chosen creatures: difficult terrain, WIS save or 3d8 radiant/necrotic on turn start (half on save). +1d8 per higher slot.

spells.name: Stinking Cloud

material.desc: a rotten egg or several skunk cabbage leaves

spells.desc: You create a 20-foot-radius sphere of yellow, nauseating gas centered on a point within range. The cloud spreads around corners, and its area is heavily obscured. The cloud lingers in the air for the duration. Each creature that starts its turn in the cloud must succeed on a Constitution saving throw or spend its action that turn retching and reeling.

spells.name: Tongues

material.desc: a small clay model of a ziggurat

spells.desc: This spell grants the creature you touch the ability to understand any spoken language it hears. Moreover, when the target speaks, any creature that knows at least one language and can hear the target understands what it says.

spells.name: Vampiric Touch
spells.desc: Melee spell attack: 3d6 necrotic damage, regain HP equal to half. Repeat each turn as action. +1d6 per higher slot.

spells.name: Water Breathing

material.desc: a short reed or piece of straw

spells.desc: This spell grants up to ten willing creatures you can see within range the ability to breathe underwater until the spell ends. Affected creatures also retain their normal mode of respiration.

spells.name: Water Walk

material.desc: a piece of cork

spells.desc: This spell grants the ability to move across any liquid surface—such as water, acid, mud, snow, quicksand, or lava—as if it were harmless solid ground (creatures crossing molten lava can still take damage from the heat). Up to ten willing creatures you can see within range gain this ability for the duration.

spells.name: Wind Wall

material.desc: a tiny fan and a feather of exotic origin

spells.desc: A wall of strong wind rises from the ground at a point you choose within range. You can make the wall up to 50 feet long, 15 feet high, and 1 foot thick. You can shape the wall in any way you choose as long as it makes one continuous path. The wall keeps fog, smoke, and other gases at bay. Small or smaller flying creatures or objects can't pass through the wall.

spells.name: Banishment

material.desc: a silver key

spells.desc: Attempt to send one creature you can see within range to another plane. The target must succeed on a Charisma saving throw or be banished. If banished to a harmless demiplane, the creature is incapacitated; on a successful save, they return at the end of the spell. If they started on a different plane and the spell lasts the full duration, they don't return.

spells.name: Blight
spells.desc: Necromantic energy washes over a creature of your choice. The target must make a Constitution saving throw, taking 8d8 necrotic damage on a failed save, or half as much on a success. Plants and undead are treated specially.

spells.name: Confusion

material.desc: three nut shells

spells.desc: This spell assaults and twists creatures' minds. Each creature in a 10-foot-radius sphere must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or be affected. Affected creatures can't take reactions and roll a d10 at the start of each turn to determine behavior.

spells.name: Conjure Minor Elementals
spells.desc: You summon elementals of CR 2 or lower. Choose one of the following: one elemental of CR 2 or lower; two elementals of CR 1 or lower; four elementals of CR 1/2 or lower; or eight elementals of CR 1/4 or lower.

spells.name: Conjure Woodland Beings

material.desc: one holly berry per creature summoned

spells.desc: You summon fey creatures that appear in unoccupied spaces within range. Choose one of the following options for what appears: one fey creature of CR 2 or lower; two fey creatures of CR 1 or lower; four fey creatures of CR 1/2 or lower; or eight fey creatures of CR 1/4 or lower.

spells.name: Control Water

material.desc: a drop of water and a pinch of dust

spells.desc: Until the spell ends, you control any freestanding water inside an area. Choose one of the following effects: Flood, Part Water, Redirect Flow, or Whirlpool. As an action, you can repeat the same effect or choose a different one.

spells.name: Death Ward
spells.desc: You touch a creature and grant it a measure of protection from death. The first time the target would drop to 0 hit points as a result of taking damage, the target instead drops to 1 hit point, and the spell ends. Alternatively, if the target would be killed outright by a spell or other magical effect, the spell instead negates that effect.

spells.name: Dimension Door
spells.desc: You teleport yourself from your current location to any spot within range. You arrive at exactly the spot desired. It can be a place you can see, one you can visualize, or one you can describe. You can bring along objects up to your carrying capacity. You can also bring along one willing creature of your size or smaller.

spells.name: Divination

material.desc: incense and a sacrificial offering, consumed by the spell, worth 25 GP

spells.desc: Your magic and an offering put you in contact with a god or a god's servants. Ask a single question about a specific goal, event, or activity to occur within 7 days. The DM offers a truthful reply: a short phrase, a cryptic rhyme, or an omen. Multiple castings in a day reduce accuracy.

spells.name: Dominate Beast
spells.desc: You attempt to beguile a beast that you can see within range. It must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or be charmed by you for the duration. While charmed, you have a telepathic link and can issue commands. Each time it takes damage, it makes a new saving throw.

spells.name: Fire Shield

material.desc: a bit of phosphorus or a firefly

spells.desc: Thin and wispy flames wreathe your body. They shed bright light in a 10-foot radius. You can choose warm or chill flames. Warm flames grant resistance to cold damage and deal 2d8 fire damage to attackers. Chill flames grant resistance to fire damage and deal 2d8 cold damage to attackers.

spells.name: Freedom of Movement

material.desc: a leather strap bound around the arm or a similar appendage

spells.desc: You touch a willing creature. For the duration, difficult terrain doesn't cost extra movement, and the target can't be paralyzed or restrained by spells or nonmagical means. It can also spend 5 feet of movement to escape from nonmagical restraints.

spells.name: Giant Insect
spells.desc: You transform up to ten centipedes, three wasps, five hornets, or one scorpion within range into giant versions of their natural forms for the duration. Use the stat blocks for giant centipede, giant wasp, or giant scorpion. You can command them with a bonus action.

spells.name: Grasping Vine
spells.desc: You conjure a vine that sprouts from the ground in an unoccupied space. When you cast this spell, you can direct the vine to lash out at a creature within 30 feet of it. The target must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or be pulled up to 30 feet toward the vine.

spells.name: Greater Invisibility
spells.desc: You or a creature you touch becomes invisible until the spell ends. Anything the target is wearing or carrying is invisible as long as it is on the target's person. Unlike regular Invisibility, this spell doesn't end when the target attacks or casts a spell.

spells.name: Hallucinatory Terrain

material.desc: a stone, a twig, and a bit of green plant

spells.desc: You make natural terrain in a 150-foot cube within range look, sound, and smell like some other sort of natural terrain. A creature can discern the illusion with a successful Intelligence (Investigation) check against your spell save DC.

spells.name: Ice Storm

material.desc: a pinch of dust and a few drops of water

spells.desc: A hail of rock-hard ice pounds to the ground in a 20-foot-radius, 40-foot-high cylinder. Each creature in the cylinder must make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, a creature takes 2d8 bludgeoning damage and 4d6 cold damage. On a success, half damage. The area is difficult terrain until the end of your next turn.

spells.name: Locate Creature

material.desc: a bit of fur from a bloodhound

spells.desc: Describe or name a creature familiar to you. You sense the direction to the creature's location if it is within 1,000 feet and is not protected by a nondetection spell or similar magic.

spells.name: Phantasmal Killer
spells.desc: You tap into the nightmares of a creature you can see and create an illusory manifestation of its deepest fears. The target must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or become frightened for the duration. While frightened, the target must take the Dash action and move away from you. At the end of each turn the target can make a Wisdom saving throw; on a success, the spell ends.

spells.name: Polymorph

material.desc: a caterpillar cocoon

spells.desc: This spell transforms a creature that you can see within range into a new form. An unwilling creature must make a Wisdom saving throw to resist. The new form can be any beast whose challenge rating is equal to or less than the target's (or the target's level, if it has no CR).

spells.name: Stone Shape

material.desc: soft clay which must be worked into roughly the desired shape of the stone object

spells.desc: You touch a stone object of Medium size or smaller or a section of stone no more than 5 feet in any dimension and form it into any shape that suits your purpose. For example, you could shape a large rock into a weapon, idol, or coffer, or make a small passage through a wall.

spells.name: Stoneskin

material.desc: diamond dust worth 100 GP, which the spell consumes

spells.desc: This spell turns the flesh of a willing creature you touch as hard as stone. Until the spell ends, the target has resistance to nonmagical bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage.

spells.name: Wall of Fire

material.desc: a small piece of phosphorus

spells.desc: You create a wall of fire on a solid surface within range. The wall can be up to 60 feet long, 20 feet high, and 1 foot thick, or a ringed wall up to 20 feet in diameter, 20 feet high, and 1 foot thick. The wall is opaque and lasts for the duration. A creature that enters the wall for the first time or starts its turn there takes 5d8 fire damage.

spells.name: Animate Objects
spells.desc: Objects come to life at your command. Choose up to ten nonmagical objects within range that are not being worn or carried. Medium objects count as two objects, Large as four, Huge as eight. Each animated object uses the statistics for an Animated Object of the appropriate size.

spells.name: Antilife Shell
spells.desc: A shimmering barrier extends out from you in a 10-foot radius. The barrier prevents beasts and other creatures from passing or reaching through it. An affected creature can cast spells or make attacks with ranged or reach weapons through the barrier.

spells.name: Awaken

material.desc: an agate worth at least 1,000 GP, which the spell consumes

spells.desc: After spending the casting time tracing magical pathways within a precious gemstone, you touch a Huge or smaller beast or plant. The target must have either no Intelligence score or an Intelligence of 3 or less. The target gains an Intelligence of 10, the ability to speak one language, and if it was a plant, mobility and senses.

spells.name: Cloudkill
spells.desc: You create a 20-foot-radius sphere of poisonous, yellow-green fog centered on a point you choose within range. The fog moves 10 feet away from you at the start of each of your turns, rolling along the ground. A creature that starts its turn in the cloud must make a Constitution saving throw, taking 5d8 poison damage on a fail, or half on a success.

spells.name: Commune

material.desc: incense and a vial of holy or unholy water

spells.desc: You contact your deity or a divine proxy and ask up to three questions that can be answered with a yes or no. The DM answers each question honestly. The spell doesn't account for circumstances that might change the answer.

spells.name: Commune with Nature
spells.desc: You briefly become one with nature and gain knowledge of the surrounding territory. Outdoors, the spell gives you knowledge of the land within 3 miles. Underground or in natural settings, 300 feet. You automatically learn facts about the terrain, plants, bodies of water, prevalence of beasts, and presence of powerful celestials, fey, or undead.

spells.name: Cone of Cold

material.desc: a small crystal or glass cone

spells.desc: A blast of cold air erupts from your hands in a 60-foot cone. Each creature in the cone must make a Constitution saving throw, taking 8d8 cold damage on a failed save, or half as much on a success. Creatures killed by this spell become frozen statues until they thaw.

spells.name: Conjure Elemental

material.desc: burning incense for air, soft clay for earth, sulfur and phosphorus for fire, or water and sand for water

spells.desc: You call forth an elemental servant. The elemental appears in an unoccupied space within range. Choose its type: air elemental, earth elemental, fire elemental, or water elemental. If you lose concentration, the elemental doesn't disappear but you lose control of it.

spells.name: Contact Other Plane
spells.desc: You mentally contact a demigod, the spirit of a long-dead sage, or some other mysterious entity. You can ask up to five questions. You must make a DC 15 Intelligence saving throw or suffer psychic damage and be incapacitated. On a success, the entity answers each question with one word.

spells.name: Contagion
spells.desc: Your touch inflicts disease. Make a melee spell attack against a creature within your reach. On a hit, you afflict the creature with a disease of your choice from the list of diseases below. The target must make a Constitution saving throw at the end of each of its turns for 3 consecutive turns; after 3 failed saves, the disease lasts for 7 days.

spells.name: Creation

material.desc: a tiny piece of matter of the same type of the item you plan to create

spells.desc: You pull wisps of shadow material from the Shadowfell to create a nonliving object of vegetable matter up to 5 cubic feet in volume. The item lasts a duration based on material type (cloth: 1 day, wood: 8 hours, stone or crystal: 12 hours, precious metals: 1 hour, gems: 10 minutes, adamantine or mithral: 1 minute).

spells.name: Dispel Evil and Good

material.desc: holy water or powdered silver and iron

spells.desc: Shimmering energy surrounds and protects you from fey, undead, and creatures originating from beyond the Material Plane. Until the spell ends, celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead have disadvantage on attack rolls against you. You can use your action to end the spell early and perform a special dismissal or breaking enchantment.

spells.name: Dominate Person
spells.desc: You attempt to beguile a humanoid you can see within range. It must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or be charmed by you. While charmed, you have a telepathic link with it. You can use that telepathic link to issue commands on your turn, directing it to take actions. Each time it takes damage, it makes a new Wisdom save.

spells.name: Dream

material.desc: a handful of sand, a dab of ink, and a writing quill plucked from a sleeping bird

spells.desc: This spell shapes a creature's dreams. Choose a creature known to you as the target. The target must be asleep. You or a willing creature you touch enters a trance state, acting as a messenger. The messenger appears in the target's dreams. If the target is hostile, you can deliver a nightmare that deals 3d6 psychic damage.

spells.name: Flame Strike

material.desc: pinch of sulfur

spells.desc: A vertical column of divine fire roars down from the heavens in a location you specify. Each creature in a 10-foot-radius, 40-foot-high cylinder centered on a point within range must make a Dexterity saving throw. A creature takes 4d6 fire damage and 4d6 radiant damage on a failed save, or half as much on a successful one.

spells.name: Geas
spells.desc: You place a magical command on a creature that you can see within range, forcing it to carry out some service or refrain from an action. If the creature disobeys, it takes 5d10 psychic damage each day. A remove curse, greater restoration, or wish spell ends this effect.

spells.name: Greater Restoration

material.desc: diamond dust worth 100 GP, which the spell consumes

spells.desc: You imbue a creature you touch with positive energy to undo a debilitating effect. You can reduce the target's exhaustion level by one, or end one of the following: a charm or petrification, a curse, a reduction to ability score or hit points, or any one effect from a list of effects.

spells.name: Hallow

material.desc: herbs, oils, and incense worth 1,000 GP, which the spell consumes

spells.desc: You touch a point and infuse an area around it with holy or unholy power. The area can have a radius up to 60 feet. Celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead can't enter the area, and such creatures can't charm, frighten, or possess creatures within it. You can also choose an additional effect from a list.

spells.name: Hold Monster

material.desc: a small, straight piece of iron

spells.desc: Choose a creature that you can see within range. The target must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or be paralyzed for the duration. This spell has no effect on undead. At the end of each of its turns, the target can make another Wisdom saving throw; on a success, the spell ends.

spells.name: Insect Plague

material.desc: a few grains of sugar, some kernels of grain, and a smear of fat

spells.desc: Swarming, biting locusts fill a 20-foot-radius sphere centered on a point you choose within range. The sphere spreads around corners. Any creature in the sphere when you cast the spell must make a Constitution saving throw. A creature takes 4d10 piercing damage on a failed save. Creatures that start their turn in the sphere must make the same save.

spells.name: Legend Lore

material.desc: incense worth 250 GP that burns for the duration and four ivory strips worth 50 GP each

spells.desc: Name or describe a person, place, or object. The spell brings to your mind a brief summary of the significant lore about the thing you named. The lore might consist of current tales, forgotten stories, or even secret lore that has never been widely known.

spells.name: Mass Cure Wounds
spells.desc: A wave of healing energy washes out from a point of your choice within range. Choose up to six creatures in a 30-foot-radius sphere centered on that point. Each target regains hit points equal to 3d8 + your spellcasting ability modifier. This spell has no effect on undead or constructs.

spells.name: Mislead
spells.desc: You become invisible at the same time that an illusory double of you appears where you are standing. The double lasts for the duration, but the invisibility ends if you attack or cast a spell. You can use your action to move your illusory double up to twice your speed.

spells.name: Modify Memory
spells.desc: You attempt to reshape another creature's memories. One creature you can see must make a Wisdom saving throw. If it fails, it becomes charmed by you for the duration. While charmed, the target has a dazed look. You can alter a memory of an event that lasted up to 10 minutes and that occurred within the last 24 hours.

spells.name: Passwall

material.desc: a pinch of sesame seeds

spells.desc: A passage appears at a point of your choice that you can see on a wooden, plaster, or stone surface (such as a wall, a ceiling, or a floor) within range, and lasts for the duration. You choose the opening's dimensions: up to 5 feet wide, 8 feet tall, and 20 feet deep.

spells.name: Planar Binding

material.desc: a jewel worth at least 1,000 GP, which the spell consumes

spells.desc: With this spell, you attempt to bind a celestial, an elemental, a fey, or a fiend to your service. The creature must be within range for the entire casting. At the completion, the target must make a Charisma saving throw. On a failed save, it is bound to serve you for the duration.

spells.name: Raise Dead

material.desc: a diamond worth 500 GP, which the spell consumes

spells.desc: You return a dead creature you touch to life, provided that it has been dead no longer than 10 days. If the creature's soul is both willing and at liberty to rejoin the body, the creature returns to life with 1 hit point. This spell also neutralizes any poisons and cures nonmagical diseases.

spells.name: Reincarnate

material.desc: rare oils and unguents worth 1,000 GP, which the spell consumes

spells.desc: You touch a dead humanoid or a piece of a dead humanoid. Provided that the creature has been dead no longer than 10 days, the spell forms a new adult body for it and then calls the soul to enter that body. The DM rolls on a table to determine the new race.

spells.name: Scrying

material.desc: a focus worth at least 1,000 GP, such as a crystal ball, silver mirror, or font of holy water

spells.desc: You can see and hear a particular creature you choose that is on the same plane of existence. The target must make a Wisdom saving throw, modified by how well you know the target and the sort of physical connection you have to it. On a failed save, the spell creates an invisible sensor within 10 feet of the target.

spells.name: Seeming
spells.desc: This spell allows you to change the appearance of any number of creatures that you can see within range. You give each target you choose a new illusory appearance. An unwilling target can make a Charisma saving throw, and if it succeeds, the spell has no effect on it.

spells.name: Teleportation Circle

material.desc: rare chalks and inks infused with precious gems worth 50 GP, which the spell consumes

spells.desc: As you cast the spell, you draw a 10-foot-diameter circle on the ground inscribed with sigils that link your location to a permanent teleportation circle of your choice whose sigil sequence you know and that is on the same plane. A shimmering portal opens within the circle and remains open until the end of your next turn.

spells.name: Tree Stride
spells.desc: You gain the ability to enter a tree and move from inside it to inside another tree of the same kind within 500 feet. Once per round, using 5 feet of movement, you can pass into one tree and exit from the second tree by appearing in an unoccupied space within 5 feet of the second tree.

spells.name: Wall of Force

material.desc: a pinch of powder made by crushing a clear gemstone

spells.desc: An invisible wall of force springs into existence at a point you choose within range. The wall appears in any orientation you choose, as a horizontal or vertical barrier or at an angle. It can be free floating or resting on a solid surface. You can form it into a hemispherical dome or a sphere. The wall is immune to all damage and can't be dispelled.

spells.name: Wall of Stone

material.desc: a small block of granite

spells.desc: A nonmagical wall of solid stone springs into existence at a point you choose within range. The wall is 6 inches thick and is composed of ten 10-foot-by-10-foot panels. Each panel must be contiguous with at least one other panel. If the wall cuts through a creature's space, the creature is pushed to one side.

spells.name: Arcane Gate
spells.desc: You create linked teleportation portals that remain open for the duration. Choose two points on the ground that you can see, one within 10 feet of you and one within 500 feet of you. A circular portal 10 feet in diameter opens over each point. Any creature or object entering one portal exits from the other.

spells.name: Blade Barrier
spells.desc: You create a vertical wall of whirling, razor-sharp blades made of magical energy. The wall appears within range and is 100 feet long, 20 feet high, and 5 feet thick. The wall is opaque. When a creature enters the wall's area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, the creature must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking 6d10 slashing damage on a failed save.

spells.name: Chain Lightning

material.desc: a bit of fur, a piece of amber or glass, and three silver pins

spells.desc: You create a bolt of lightning that arcs toward a target of your choice that you can see within range. Three bolts then leap from that target to as many as three other targets, each of which must be within 30 feet of the first target. A target can be a creature or an object. Each target must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking 10d8 lightning damage on a failed save, or half on a success.

spells.name: Circle of Death

material.desc: the powder of a crushed black pearl worth 500 GP

spells.desc: A sphere of negative energy ripples out in a 60-foot-radius sphere from a point within range. Each creature in that area must make a Constitution saving throw. A target takes 8d6 necrotic damage on a failed save, or half as much on a success.

spells.name: Conjure Fey
spells.desc: You summon a fey creature of CR 6 or lower, or a fey spirit that takes the form of a beast of CR 6 or lower. It appears in an unoccupied space that you can see within range. If you lose concentration, the creature doesn't disappear and you lose control of it.

spells.name: Contingency

material.desc: a statuette of yourself carved from ivory and decorated with gems worth 1,500 GP

spells.desc: Choose a spell of 5th level or lower that you can cast, that has a casting time of 1 action, and that can target you. Cast that contingent spell (without spending a spell slot), and name a trigger. The contingent spell is cast when the trigger occurs.

spells.name: Create Undead

material.desc: one clay pot filled with grave dirt, one clay pot filled with brackish water, and one 150 GP black onyx stone for each corpse

spells.desc: You can cast this spell only at night. Choose up to three corpses of Medium or Small humanoids within range. Each corpse becomes a ghoul under your control. On each of your turns, you can mentally command any creature you animaged with this spell.

spells.name: Disintegrate

material.desc: a lodestone and a pinch of dust

spells.desc: A thin green ray springs from your pointing finger to a target you can see within range. The target can be a creature, an object, or a creation of magical force. A creature targeted must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking 10d6+40 force damage on a fail. If this damage reduces it to 0 HP, it is disintegrated.

spells.name: Eyebite
spells.desc: For the duration, your eyes become an inky void imbued with dread power. One creature of your choice within 60 feet of you that you can see must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or be affected with one of the following until the spell ends: Asleep, Panicked, or Sickened.

spells.name: Find the Path

material.desc: a set of divination tools worth 100 GP and an object from the location you seek

spells.desc: This spell allows you to find the shortest, most direct physical route to a specific fixed location that you are familiar with on the same plane of existence. If you name a destination on another plane, in a moving location, or a destination that doesn't exist, the spell fails.

spells.name: Flesh to Stone

material.desc: a pinch of lime, water, and earth

spells.desc: You attempt to turn one creature that you can see within range into stone. If the target's body is made of flesh, the creature must make a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, it is restrained. While restrained this way, the target must repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns. On three failures, it is turned to stone permanently.

spells.name: Forbiddance

material.desc: a sprinkling of holy water, rare incense, and powdered ruby worth 1,000 GP

spells.desc: You create a ward against magical travel that protects up to 40,000 square feet of floor space to a height of 30 feet above the floor. For the duration, creatures can't teleport into the area or use portals to enter the area. The ward also prevents planar travel. Damage type determined by alignment.

spells.name: Globe of Invulnerability

material.desc: a glass or crystal bead that shatters when the spell ends

spells.desc: An immobile, faintly shimmering barrier springs into existence in a 10-foot radius around you and remains for the duration. Any spell of 5th level or lower cast from outside the barrier can't affect creatures or objects within it, even if the spell is cast using a higher level slot.

spells.name: Guards and Wards

material.desc: burning incense, a small measure of brimstone and oil, a knotted string, a small amount of umber hulk blood, and a small silver rod worth 10 GP

spells.desc: You create a ward that protects up to 2,500 square feet of floor space. Multiple effects protect this area: magical fog, locked doors, magical darkness, false doors, and other obstacles. The whole warded area radiates magic.

spells.name: Harm
spells.desc: You unleash a virulent disease on a creature within range. The target must make a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, it takes 14d6 necrotic damage. The target's hit point maximum is reduced by the amount of necrotic damage taken until a long rest. This reduction can't reduce the target's maximum below 1.

spells.name: Heal
spells.desc: Choose a creature you can see within range. A surge of positive energy washes through the creature, causing it to regain 70 hit points. This spell also ends blindness, deafness, and any diseases affecting the target. This spell has no effect on constructs or undead.

spells.name: Heroes' Feast

material.desc: a gem-encrusted bowl worth 1,000 GP, which the spell consumes

spells.desc: You bring forth a great feast, including magnificent food and drink. The feast takes 1 hour to consume and disappears at the end of that time, and the beneficial effects don't set in until this hour is over. Up to twelve creatures can partake of the feast. They gain immunity to poison and disease, Wisdom saving throw advantage, and 2d10 temporary HP.

spells.name: Magic Jar

material.desc: a gem, crystal, reliquary, or some other ornamental container worth 500 GP

spells.desc: Your body falls into a catatonic state as your soul leaves it and enters the container. While your soul inhabits the container, you can telepathically sense any humanoid within 100 feet. You can attempt to possess a humanoid's body by forcing a Charisma saving throw.

spells.name: Mass Suggestion

material.desc: a snake's tongue and either a bit of honeycomb or a drop of sweet oil

spells.desc: You suggest a course of activity (limited to a sentence or two) and magically influence up to twelve creatures of your choice that you can see within range, which can hear and understand you. Creatures that can't be charmed are immune. The suggestion must be worded so as to make the course of action sound reasonable.

spells.name: Move Earth

material.desc: an iron blade and a small bag containing a mixture of soils—clay, loam, and sand

spells.desc: Choose an area of terrain no larger than 40 feet on a side within range. You can reshape dirt, sand, or clay in the area in any manner you choose for the duration. You can raise or lower the area's elevation, create or fill in a trench, erect or flatten a wall, or form a pillar.

spells.name: Otto's Irresistible Dance
spells.desc: Choose one creature within range. The target begins a comic dance in place: shuffling, tapping its feet, and capering for the duration. Creatures immune to charm are unaffected. A dancing creature must use all its movement to dance, has disadvantage on Dexterity saving throws and attack rolls, and grants advantage to attackers.

spells.name: Planar Ally
spells.desc: You beseech an otherworldly entity for aid. The entity can be a good deity, evil deity, a powerful elemental, or another cosmic power. The DM chooses what form the ally takes. The ally might be a celestial, an elemental, or a fiend. You must negotiate with it for its service.

spells.name: Programmed Illusion

material.desc: a bit of fleece and jade dust worth at least 25 GP

spells.desc: You create an illusion of an object, a creature, or some other visible phenomenon within range that activates when a specific condition occurs. A creature can detect the illusion by succeeding on an Intelligence (Investigation) check against your spell save DC.

spells.name: Sunbeam

material.desc: a magnifying glass

spells.desc: A beam of brilliant light flashes out from your hand in a 5-foot-wide, 60-foot-long line. Each creature in the line must make a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, a creature takes 6d8 radiant damage and is blinded until your next turn. Undead and oozes have disadvantage. On a success, half damage.

spells.name: Transport via Plants
spells.desc: This spell creates a magical link between a Large or larger inanimate plant within range and another plant, at any distance, on the same plane. Any creature can step into the target plant and exit from the destination plant by using 5 feet of movement.

spells.name: True Seeing

material.desc: an ointment made from mushroom powder, saffron, and fat worth 25 GP

spells.desc: You give the willing creature you touch the ability to see things as they actually are. For the duration, the creature has truesight, can see into the Ethereal Plane, and notices secret doors hidden by magic, all out to 120 feet.

spells.name: Wall of Ice

material.desc: a small piece of quartz

spells.desc: You create a wall of ice on a solid surface within range. The wall is 1 foot thick and up to 30 feet long and 10 feet high, or it's a hemispherical dome up to 20 feet in diameter. The wall lasts for the duration. Each 10-foot section has AC 12 and 30 hit points. Creatures in the wall's space take 10d6 cold damage.

spells.name: Wall of Thorns

material.desc: a handful of thorns

spells.desc: You create a wall of tough, pliable, tangled brush bristling with needle-sharp thorns. The wall appears within range on a solid surface and lasts for the duration. You choose to make the wall up to 60 feet long, 10 feet high, and 5 feet thick or a circle with a diameter of up to 20 feet. Creatures entering take 7d8 piercing damage.

spells.name: Wind Walk

material.desc: fire and holy water

spells.desc: You and up to ten willing creatures you can see within range assume a gaseous form for the duration, appearing as wisps of cloud. While in this cloud form, a creature has a flying speed of 300 feet and has resistance to damage from nonmagical weapons.

spells.name: Word of Recall
spells.desc: You and up to five willing creatures within 5 feet of you instantly teleport to a previously designated sanctuary. You establish the sanctuary by casting this spell in the location you want to designate, while attuned to a specific place of worship to your deity. After you cast the spell in the sanctuary, you and up to 5 willing creatures within 5 feet can teleport to it.

spells.name: Conjure Celestial
spells.desc: You summon a celestial of challenge rating 4 or lower, which appears in an unoccupied space that you can see within range. If you lose concentration, the celestial doesn't disappear; it acts according to its nature.

spells.name: Delayed Blast Fireball

material.desc: a tiny ball of bat guano and sulfur

spells.desc: A beam of yellow light flashes from your pointing finger, then condenses to linger at a chosen point within range as a glowing bead for the duration. When the spell ends—either because your concentration is broken or because you decide to end it—the bead blossoms with a low roar into an explosion of flame that spreads around corners. Each creature in a 20-foot-radius sphere must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking at minimum 12d6 fire damage.

spells.name: Divine Word
spells.desc: You utter a divine word, imbued with the power that shaped the world. Choose any number of creatures you can see within range. Each creature that can hear you must make a Charisma saving throw. On a failed save, a creature suffers an effect based on its current hit points: 50 or fewer—deafened; 40 or fewer—blinded and deafened; 30 or fewer—stunned, blinded, deafened; 20 or fewer—killed instantly.

spells.name: Etherealness
spells.desc: You step into the border regions of the Ethereal Plane, where you remain for the duration. For the duration, you can move in any direction—up, down, or sideways. If you move up or down, every foot of movement costs an extra foot. You can see and hear the Material Plane, but everything looks gray, and you can't see anything more than 60 feet away. You can only affect and be affected by other creatures on the Ethereal Plane.

spells.name: Finger of Death
spells.desc: You send negative energy coursing through a creature that you can see within range, causing it searing pain. The target must make a Constitution saving throw. It takes 7d8+30 necrotic damage on a failed save, or half as much on a successful one. A humanoid killed by this spell rises at the start of your next turn as a zombie that is permanently under your command.

spells.name: Fire Storm
spells.desc: A storm made up of sheets of roaring flame appears in a location you choose within range. The area of the storm consists of up to ten 10-foot cubes, which you can arrange as you wish. Each cube must have at least one face adjacent to the face of another cube. Each creature in the area must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking 7d10 fire damage on a failed save, or half on a success.

spells.name: Forcecage

material.desc: ruby dust worth 1,500 GP

spells.desc: An immobile, invisible, cube-shaped prison composed of magical force springs into existence around an area you choose within range. The prison can be a cage (bars 1/2 inch thick, 1/2 inch apart) or a box (solid walls). A creature inside the cage can't leave by nonmagical means. The cage lasts for the duration.

spells.name: Mirage Arcane
spells.desc: You make terrain in an area up to 1 mile square look, sound, smell, and even feel like some other sort of terrain. Open fields or a road could be made to resemble a swamp, hill, crevasse, or some other difficult or impassable terrain. A pond can be made to seem like a grassy meadow, a precipice like a gentle slope, or a rock-strewn gully like a wide and smooth road.

spells.name: Mordenkainen's Magnificent Mansion

material.desc: a miniature portal carved from ivory, a small piece of polished marble, and a tiny silver spoon, worth 15 GP each

spells.desc: You conjure an extradimensional dwelling in range that lasts for the duration. You choose where its one entrance is located. The entrance shimmers faintly and is 5 feet wide and 10 feet tall. You and any creature you designate when you cast the spell can enter the extradimensional dwelling.

spells.name: Mordenkainen's Sword

material.desc: a miniature platinum sword with a grip and crossguard of copper and zinc, worth 250 GP

spells.desc: You create a sword-shaped plane of force that hovers within range. It lasts for the duration. When the sword appears, you make a melee spell attack against a target of your choice within 5 feet of the sword. On a hit, the target takes 3d10 force damage. Until the spell ends, you can use a bonus action on each of your turns to move the sword up to 20 feet and repeat the attack.

spells.name: Plane Shift

material.desc: a forked metal rod worth 250 GP attuned to a specific plane

spells.desc: You and up to eight willing creatures who link hands in a circle are transported to a different plane of existence. You can specify a target destination in general terms, such as the City of Brass on the Elemental Plane of Fire or the palace of Dispater on the second level of the Nine Hells. Alternatively, you can use the spell as an attack to banish an unwilling creature.

spells.name: Prismatic Spray
spells.desc: Eight rays of light flash from your hand. Each ray is a different color and has a different power. Each creature in a 60-foot cone must make a Dexterity saving throw.
